reviews.comment:
Hermosa estación, súper limpió los baños.
tiene un sector de juegos para los niños afuera muy lindo para que puedan descansar un rato del viaje. Un shop súper completo. Muy lindo todo. Atención excelente

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful station, the restrooms were spotless.
It has a lovely outdoor play area for children where they can rest for a while after their trip. A very well-stocked shop. Everything was lovely. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcnJpZjlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para destacar la higiene y los elementos para la higiene personal que en otras estaciones deja mucho que desear. Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
The hygiene and personal hygiene items were noteworthy, unlike in other resorts where they leave much to be desired. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Desayuno caro pero rico. No es ypf full ni tiene pago con la app por QR aunque dentro de la misma figure que si. Medio descuidado y complicada para estacionar. Solo hay descuentos si sos de ACA

(Translated by Google)
Breakfast is expensive but tasty. It's not a YPF Full station and doesn't accept QR code payments through the app, even though the app itself says it does. It's a bit run-down and parking is difficult. Discounts are only available for ACA members.

reviewReply.comment: Estimado los carteles indican que tenemos App YPF y Qr para la carga de combustible.
